justification: According to L0020, Gemini-Apps generate contents (e.g., text, code, audiodata, pictures, videos) based on user input. The uploaded image is considered a form of user input. Therefore, the processing of this image falls under the permitted purposes of content generation.

source_excerpts.quote: Inhalte, die von Gemini-Apps generiert werden (z. B. Text, Code, Audiodaten, Bilder, Videos)

quote_verification.quote: Inhalte, die von Gemini-Apps generiert werden (z. B. Text, Code, Audiodaten, Bilder, Videos)
